name: pet-bar-desktop
description: Cross-platform desktop-pet soundboard (fan project). Themes: Armadillo (Zerocalcare) and Boris.
author: Helias <stefanoborzi32@gmail.com>

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n ng,electron "npm run ui:serve" "wait-on http://localhost:4200 && npm run main:build && cross-env ELECTRON_START_URL=http://localhost:4200 electron ."
scripts.start: npm run ui:build && npm run main:build && electron .
scripts.build: npm run ui:build && npm run main:build && electron-builder --linux
scripts.build:win: npm run ui:build && npm run main:build && electron-builder --win
scripts.build:mac: npm run ui:build && npm run main:build && electron-builder --mac
